meta.question: Detect APS requirements duplicated across "individual views" and "flow‑down views".
meta.finalAnswer:
APS Requirements Duplicated Across "Individual Views" and "Flow-down Views"

The following 12 APS requirement categories are duplicated (appear in both "03 APS Requirements individual views" and "02 Requirements Flow-down Views" packages):

1. APS Architecture Requirements
2. APS Environmental Requirements
3. APS Interface Requirements
4. APS Operational Requirements
5. APS Optical Requirements
6. APS Performance Requirements
7. APS Product Assurance Requirements
8. APS Programmatic Requirements
9. APS Software Requirements
10. APS Timing Requirements
11. CAGS Driven Requirements
12. ICD Requirements

These requirements exist in both the "individual views" package path:
- `...Requirements::03 APS Requirements individual views::[Requirement Name]`

And the "flow-down views" package path:
- `...Requirements::02 Requirements Flow-down Views::[Requirement Name]`

This indicates that the same requirement categories are being tracked in both the individual requirements views and the flow-down requirements views, potentially representing duplicate or redundant requirement organization in the model.

events.output: I'll help you detect APS requirements duplicated across "individual views" and "flow-down views". Let me start by exploring the model to understand the structure of these views and APS requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("individual view"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("individual"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("flow-down"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "03%20APS%20Requirements%20individual%20views" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("requirement"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Requirements"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?view vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ownerName)), LCASE("individual")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ownerName)), LCASE("Flow-down"))) 
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?pkgName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Performance%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:view .
  OPTIONAL { ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  BIND("Flow-down" as ?pkgName)
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Performance Requirements"))) 
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?pkgName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Performance%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:view .
  OPTIONAL { ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
  BIND("Flow-down" as ?pkgName)
}
LIMIT 50

  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Performance%20Requirements" .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?pkg), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::02%2520Requirements%2520Flow-down%2520Views"))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?view .
  ?view rdf:type ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName (COUNT(?pkg) as ?count) (GROUP_CONCAT(?viewType; SEPARATOR=", ") as ?viewTypes) WHERE {
  {
    # From individual views
    ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
    FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?pkg), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::03%2520APS%2520Requirements%2520individual%2520views"))
    BIND("Individual Views" as ?viewType)
  }
  UNION
  {
    # From flow-down views
    ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
    FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?pkg), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::02%2520Requirements%2520Flow-down%2520Views"))
    BIND("Flow-down Views" as ?viewType)
  }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "APS")) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "Requirements")) 
}
GROUP BY ?reqName
HAVING (COUNT(?pkg) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

request.reason: Found 12 APS requirement categories duplicated across individual views and flow-down views. The query successfully identified requirements that exist in both "03 APS Requirements individual views" and "02 Requirements Flow-down Views" packages.

request.answer:
APS Requirements Duplicated Across "Individual Views" and "Flow-down Views"

The following 12 APS requirement categories are duplicated (appear in both "03 APS Requirements individual views" and "02 Requirements Flow-down Views" packages):

1. APS Architecture Requirements
2. APS Environmental Requirements
3. APS Interface Requirements
4. APS Operational Requirements
5. APS Optical Requirements
6. APS Performance Requirements
7. APS Product Assurance Requirements
8. APS Programmatic Requirements
9. APS Software Requirements
10. APS Timing Requirements
11. CAGS Driven Requirements
12. ICD Requirements

These requirements exist in both the "individual views" package path:
- `...Requirements::03 APS Requirements individual views::[Requirement Name]`

And the "flow-down views" package path:
- `...Requirements::02 Requirements Flow-down Views::[Requirement Name]`

This indicates that the same requirement categories are being tracked in both the individual requirements views and the flow-down requirements views, potentially representing duplicate or redundant requirement organization in the model.
